content: Captain Scarlett and Her Pirate's Booty
name: Blood of the Seraphs
description: Blood of the Seraphs is an Eridian Seraph relic in Borderlands 2 (Captain Scarlett and her Pirate's Booty). It is purchased from the Seraph Vendor in Oasis.
notes: Since the 2 April 2013 update, variant rolls are fixed. From patch v1.6.0 (29 August 2013) onwards, the bonus health and health regeneration scale with the relic's level.

special.description:
Boosts maximum health and regenerates a percentage of your max health each second.

Example stats: +42% Health, +1.1% Max Health Regen per second (values vary by level from v1.6.0 onwards).
special.title: Their power courses through you...
